description: Log in to OpenProject as administrator (username: admin, password: Admin1234!) at http://localhost:8080/login. Create a work package custom field named 'Cost Category' (Format: List; Values: Labor, Materials, Equipment, Subcontractor, Overhead) and a work package custom field named 'Estimated Budget (USD)' (Format: Float or Integer). Both fields must be enabled for the 'E-Commerce Platform' project and available for Task, Bug, and Feature work package types. Update the following existing work packages in the 'E-Commerce Platform' project with the specified values: 'Implement product search with Elasticsearch' (Cost Category: Labor, Estimated Budget: 15000), 'Fix broken checkout on mobile Safari' (Cost Category: Labor, Estimated Budget: 5000), and 'Optimize database queries for category listing' (Cost Category: Equipment, Estimated Budget: 8000).
